outcomes.name: Oral language and communication
outcomes.description: communicates effectively by using interpersonal conventions and language with familiar peers and adults

outcomes.name: Vocabulary
outcomes.description: understands and effectively uses Tier 1 words and Tier 2 words in familiar contexts

outcomes.name: Phonological awareness
outcomes.description: identifies, blends, segments and manipulates phonological units in spoken words as a strategy for reading and creating texts

outcomes.name: Print conventions
outcomes.description: tracks written text from left to right and from top to bottom of the page and identifies visual and spatial features of print

outcomes.name: Phonic knowledge
outcomes.description: uses single-letter grapheme–phoneme correspondences and common digraphs to decode and encode words when reading and creating texts

outcomes.name: Reading fluency
outcomes.description: reads decodable texts aloud with automaticity

outcomes.name: Reading comprehension
outcomes.description: comprehends independently read texts using background knowledge, word knowledge and understanding of how sentences connect

outcomes.name: Creating written texts
outcomes.description: creates written texts that include at least 2 related ideas and correct simple sentences

outcomes.name: Spelling
outcomes.description: applies phonological, orthographic and morphological generalisations and strategies to spell taught familiar and high-frequency words when creating texts

outcomes.name: Handwriting
outcomes.description: produces all lower-case and upper-case letters to create texts

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to literature
outcomes.description: understands and responds to literature read to them

outcomes.name: Working mathematically
outcomes.description: develops understanding and fluency in mathematics through exploring and connecting mathematical concepts, choosing and applying mathematical techniques to solve problems, and communicating their thinking and reasoning coherently and clearly

outcomes.name: Representing whole numbers
outcomes.description: demonstrates an understanding of how whole numbers indicate quantity

outcomes.name: Representing whole numbers
outcomes.description: reads numerals and represents whole numbers to at least 20

outcomes.name: Combining and separating quantities
outcomes.description: reasons about number relations to model addition and subtraction by combining and separating, and comparing collections

outcomes.name: Combining and separating quantities
outcomes.description: represents the relations between the parts that form the whole, with numbers up to 10

outcomes.name: Forming groups
outcomes.description: recognises, describes and continues repeating patterns

outcomes.name: Forming groups
outcomes.description: forms equal groups by sharing and counting collections of objects

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: describes position and gives and follows simple directions

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: describes and compares lengths

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: identifies half the length and the halfway point

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: sorts, describes, names and makes two-dimensional shapes, including triangles, circles, squares and rectangles

outcomes.name: Two-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: describes and compares areas of similar shapes

outcomes.name: Three-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: manipulates, describes and sorts three-dimensional objects

outcomes.name: Three-dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: describes and compares volumes

outcomes.name: Non-spatial measure
outcomes.description: describes and compares the masses of objects

outcomes.name: Non-spatial measure
outcomes.description: sequences events and reads hour time on clocks

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: contributes to collecting data and interprets data displays made from objects

outcomes.name: Dance
outcomes.description: experiments with and identifies ways shapes and movements are used in dance

outcomes.name: Drama
outcomes.description: experiments with and identifies ways feelings, ideas, roles and situations are embodied and enacted in drama

outcomes.name: Music
outcomes.description: experiments with and identifies ways sound is organised in music through singing, moving, playing instruments and using listening skills

outcomes.name: Visual Arts
outcomes.description: experiments with and identifies ways materials and techniques are used to represent subject matter and ideas in artworks

outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: uses modelled target language in simple exchanges

outcomes.name: Responding
outcomes.description: responds to simple texts through words, gestures or expression

outcomes.name: Composing
outcomes.description: composes simple texts in the target language using supports and other scaffolds

outcomes.name: The role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: recognises different languages and cultures in their immediate environment and the world

outcomes.name: Language awareness and building
outcomes.description: recognises that some Aboriginal Languages are being maintained, revived and/or strengthened

outcomes.name: Interacting in Auslan
outcomes.description: exchanges meaning using key signs and common protocols

outcomes.name: Understanding texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: identifies key signs and information and responds in a variety of ways

outcomes.name: Creating texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: creates simple texts on known topics using key signs

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: identifies different communication methods

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: recognises and responds to information to demonstrate understanding of simple texts with modelled vocabulary, actions or visuals

outcomes.name: Intercultural understanding
outcomes.description: identifies people and places of the past represented in the target language

outcomes.name: Aboriginal Connections to Country
outcomes.description: identifies ways that Aboriginal Peoples connect with Country, Culture and Community

outcomes.name: Geography
outcomes.description: identifies and locates places people connect with, using geographical information

outcomes.name: History
outcomes.description: identifies information about daily life and transport in the past, using stories, images and objects

outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: exchanges meaning through play and actions by reproducing culturally appropriate modelled language

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: responds to information in simple texts in a variety of ways to demonstrate understanding

outcomes.name: Creating texts
outcomes.description: creates simple texts by reproducing culturally appropriate modelled vocabulary

outcomes.name: Movement skill and physical activity
outcomes.description: demonstrates fundamental movement skills and participates with others in physical activities

outcomes.name: Respectful relationships and safety
outcomes.description: identifies how respectful relationships and safety contribute to wellbeing

outcomes.name: Identity, health and wellbeing
outcomes.description: identifies factors that contribute to identity, health and wellbeing

outcomes.name: Self-management and interpersonal skills
outcomes.description: identifies and demonstrates self-management and interpersonal skills

subjects.name: Science and Technology
subjects.description: Learning area for Science and Technology

outcomes.name: Science
outcomes.description: identifies and describes characteristics of living things, properties of materials, and movement

outcomes.name: Science Inquiry
outcomes.description: poses questions based on observations to collect data

outcomes.name: Technology
outcomes.description: identifies and uses technologies to make products to address user needs or opportunities
